name: ref关联-org名称
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_org (id, name, code, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '技术部', 'TECH', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, org_id, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 1, 'a', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1)
DELETE FROM mql_test_org WHERE id IN (1)

name: ref关联+过滤条件
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_org (id, name, code, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '技术部', 'TECH', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_org (id, name, code, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '市场部', 'MKT', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, org_id, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 1, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, org_id, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 2, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)
DELETE FROM mql_test_org WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: 多级关联-order→user→org
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_org (id, name, code, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '技术部', 'TECH', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, org_id, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 1, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tenant_code) VALUES (1, 'NO1', 1, 100, 'pending', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_order WHERE id IN (1)
DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1)
DELETE FROM mql_test_org WHERE id IN (1)

name: 订单-明细关联
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tenant_code) VALUES (1, 'NO1', 1, 100, 'pending', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_order_item (id, order_id, product_name, qty, price, tenant_code) VALUES (1, 1, '商品A', 2, 50, 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_order_item WHERE id IN (1)
DELETE FROM mql_test_order WHERE id IN (1)
